sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n18891" key="a)yinqi/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀψινθ-ίτης</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῑ] οἶνος</foreign> wine <sense id="n18891.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">prepared with wormwood,</tr_> ibid.</sense> </entryFree>
